metrics.finalAnswer:
11 injection points across two architectural tiers:

---

**`budgetedMessages` tier** (stripped automatically next turn via `stripSyntheticFromMessages`):

| # | Lines | Kind | Trigger |
|---|-------|------|---------|
| 1 | ~395‚Äì407 | `research-mode` | `permissionMode === 'research'` ‚Äî every turn |
| 2 | ~411‚Äì423 | `explore-mode` | `taskMode === 'explore'` ‚Äî every turn |
| 3 | ~435‚Äì447 | `plan-mode` | `permissionMode === 'plan' && planFilePath != null` ‚Äî every turn once a plan file exists |
| 4 | ~461‚Äì466 | `recovery` (mild) | `consecutiveFailureTurns === 1` ‚Äî exactly one prior all-failure turn |
| 5 | ~461‚Äì466 | `recovery` (escalated) | `consecutiveFailureTurns >= 2` ‚Äî demands vault check before retrying |
| 6 | ~477‚Äì489 | `rejection-steering` | `repeatedToolRejectionReminder != null` ‚Äî same tool rejected ‚â•2√ó in a single request; one-shot, cleared after injection |

The rejection-steering string itself has two variants (built at ~206‚Äì214): the TypeScript-in-Python-Repl flavor (when output matches `/TypeScript\/JavaScript/i`) and the generic "switch approach" flavor.

---

**`messages` (canonical) tier** (persist in history, stripped next turn):

| # | Lines | Trigger |
|---|-------|---------|
| 7 | ~821‚Äì825 | Research mode + model responded text-only + `research.save` not yet called; capped at 2 forced continuations |
| 8 | ~840‚Äì843 | Plan mode + model responded text-only + `ExitPlanMode` not called; capped at 2 forced continuations |

---

**Architectural note:** The budgeted-tier injections are ephemeral by design ‚Äî they ride one turn and vanish. The canonical-tier injections are forced continuations that must survive into the history so the next model call sees the nudge; they're cleaned up by `stripSyntheticFromMessages` on the following turn.
